title: Day of Reckoning
writer: Zelda Sears, Eve Greene, Morris Lavine
actors: Richard Dix, Madge Evans, Conway Tearle
plot: John and Dorothy are happily married for 4 years when he's suddenly arrested for stealing money, which he did to support his wife's high tastes. George hires a lawyer for John to see that he gets prison time so he can movie in on ...
